requests.name: Seed Test Bidders
requests.notes: Creates 5 test student bidders (@houserush.test) and places 2-3 staggered bids per active listing. Safe to run multiple times — skips existing users. Returns { users_created, bids_placed }.

requests.name: Wipe Test Bidders
requests.notes: Deletes all @houserush.test users and their bids. Recalculates listing currentBid and bidCount after deletion. Returns { users_deleted, bids_deleted }.
